3 ASBGVRDT AST_BEG_VER_DT Assessment Beginning Version Date DATE 8 Beginning date of the submission file that contains the version of this assessment
4 ASNDVRDT AST_END_VER_DT Assessment Correction Version Date DATE 8 Date of the submission file that contains the correction or inactivation request of this assessment.
